body.title: Day 2026-07-02
body.text:
## Done
- D-domain-object-encapsulation batch COMPLETE 3/3 (T-domain-owns-loop-and-escalation @b3ccc1f3+91ae4b73, T-thin-ds-to-domain-consumer @165a52b3; base closed 07-01). ONE shared AgenticLoop + pluggable codec; BaseDomain.run() single escalation owner; DS+minion thin consumers; dicksimnel/toolloop.py deleted; ~-400 lines.
- Design session from Akien's accumulated dump: filed 2 system-alarm tickets (T-alarm-callsites-groundloop-db-install = sources, T-vetinari-owns-alarm-escalation = sink); captured architecture/compiled-inference-thesis (three-layer starvation, warden-vs-evaluator, reference-frames-in-fascia); captured decision D-agent-capability-mixins-over-domains-2026-07-02 (status open, for review) — the big next refactor: Agent + capability-mixins-over-Domains + de-Discworld naming.
- Filed T-fix-routing-compiler-add-compiled-rule (pre-existing selector fail).
